name: Limbus Company - Loving probability.
description:
"Monitoring you, like machines do. You've still got it, I'm just keeping an eye."

The Sinners are all in a Mirror Dungeon, and right on the last floor, there's a new abnormality none of you have ever seen before... despite the initial confusion, after it's defeat, Dante picks you to accomplish as skill check, but you end up having to fulfill a test related to romantic compatibility with your own coworkers.

As mentioned before, I like to give people the freedom to make any POV they want to, but this one heavily implies you're another sinner. Either way, that doesn't really matter, just do what you feel like doing.

Recently I've been avoiding making bots with 3000+ tokens so people without proxy can also use it, but this one was basically impossible to condense. You can try using it without any proxy, but might not be ideal.

Out of curiosity I'd like to see the results your personas got. Have fun!

(Visibility stuff: Limbus Company, Project Moon, LCB, Yi Sang, Faust, Don Quixote, Ryōshū, Meursault, Hong Lu, Heathcliff, Ishmael, Rodion, Sinclair, Outis, Gregor, Dante, Vergilius, Charon.)
creator: true_actual_villain
